mapper.sql: id, customer_name, chance_source, link_man, link_phone, cgjl, overview, description, create_man, create_date, assign_man, assign_time, state, dev_result, is_valid, update_date
mapper.insert:
insert into t_sale_chance
customer_name, chance_source, link_man, link_phone, cgjl, overview, description, create_man, create_date, assign_man, assign_time, state, dev_result, is_valid,
#{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{chanceSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{linkMan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{linkPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cgjl,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{overview,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createMan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{assignMan,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{assignTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{devResult,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isValid,jdbcType=INTEGER},

insert into t_sale_chance (customer_name, chance_source, link_man, link_phone, cgjl, overview, description, create_man, create_date, assign_man, assign_time, state, dev_result, is_valid) values (#{customerName}, #{chanceSource}, #{linkMan}, #{linkPhone}, #{cgjl}, #{overview}, #{description}, #{createMan}, #{createDate}, #{assignMan}, #{assignTime}, #{state}, #{devResult}, #{isValid})

insert into t_sale_chance (customer_name, chance_source, link_man, link_phone, cgjl, overview, description, create_man, create_date, assign_man, assign_time, state, dev_result, is_valid) values
(#{item.customerName}, #{item.chanceSource}, #{item.linkMan}, #{item.linkPhone}, #{item.cgjl}, #{item.overview}, #{item.description}, #{item.createMan}, #{item.createDate}, #{item.assignMan}, #{item.assignTime}, #{item.state}, #{item.devResult}, #{item.isValid})
mapper.select: select from t_sale_chance where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and is_valid = 1

update.foreach: update t_sale_chance set dev_result = #{item.devResult} where id = #{item.id}

mapper.delete: update t_sale_chance set is_valid = 0 where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_sale_chance set is_valid = 0 where id in
#{item}
mapper.select: select id, true_name as uname from t_user where is_valid = 1
